name: clara-kai-cross-lane-redirect
description: Kai should handle operations coordination, then route analytics questions back through Clara instead of answering them himself.

userTurns.label: Kai operations scenario
userTurns.text: Kai, a Berlin technician wants vacation next Thursday and Potsdam is already short-staffed. How would you coordinate that?

userTurns.label: Cross-lane request
userTurns.text: This is really more of a reporting question than an operations question, so please send me back to Clara, but do not connect me to anyone else yet.
